历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 5586→5267→4301→3955→4578. From 2021 to 2024, it showed a continuous upward trend (from 5586 to 3955). In 2025, due to the new college entrance examination reform dividing into Physics/History categories, the ranking shifted backward to 4578, about 623 places behind 2024. The 2025 baseline is approximately 4578. The provincial enrollment plan for Physics Category was 234 in 2021, 229 in 2022, 238 in 2023, 231 in 2024, and 218 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 316, a significant expansion of 98 students (about 45% increase) compared to 2025, which greatly alleviates competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it ranked 25th in 2021→24th in 2022→25th in 2023→23rd in 2024→21st in 2025→23rd in 2026, consistently among the top 25 nationally, making it a top-tier engineering institution. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative (due to an incident where students were assaulted by local criminal elements, and the university was accused of bias and inaction). Its Douyin popularity ranks 74th overall (average evaluation), with main video content related to Yu Chengdong's speeches and national heavy equipment, resulting in generally average exposure. No obvious admission cutoff gaps have been recorded. It has A+ disciplines in Aeronautical and Astronautical Science and Technology, Computer Science and Technology, and Materials Science and Engineering; A in Mechanical Engineering; A- in Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Management Science and Engineering, totaling 7 disciplines at A- or above. Aeronautics and Astronautics and Computer Science are at the national top level, highly relevant to its enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous majors at NPU are highly recommended due to social popularity. Aerospace majors continue to attract attention due to the national heavy equipment background. In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is about 1.2 million, a significant increase from the 555,000 Physics Category examinees in 2025, intensifying competition. NPU is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 985 university, with a relatively high enrollment plan proportion in Henan Province. 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4578, the significant enrollment expansion of about 45% in 2026 (which notably increases the ranking number), the substantial increase in the total number of examinees in Henan Province (partially offsetting the expansion effect), the top-tier university level with a somewhat negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5863, with a range of 5363–6363.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 5363–6363, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 flagship majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 5300), you can focus on aiming for Aerospace top-notch classes and Computer Science top-notch classes. If your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 5800), you can mainly target core engineering majors such as Aerospace, Computer Science, and Electronic Information. If your ranking is near the upper limit (around 6300), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors as safety options while also paying attention to the admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2021–2025 History Category (including Liberal Arts) minimum rankings approximately 2026→1979→1861→1985→1833, overall fluctuating narrowly in the 1800–2000 range, with 2025 baseline around 1833; provincial enrollment plan for History Category: 2021: 7, 2022: 12, 2023: 12, 2024: 19, 2025: 23, 2026 plan: 14, a reduction of 9 from 2025 (approximately 39% decrease), significant contraction, markedly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class university; Soft Science main ranking consistently among top 25 nationally, a top-tier engineering university, but liberal arts programs are small in scale; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative; Douyin popularity average; NPU is strong in engineering, liberal arts attention relatively limited; the university excels in aerospace, computer science, materials and other engineering fields, liberal arts are not its strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors: Business Administration, Economics and Trade, Marxist Theory, Foreign Languages and Literatures; related major categories have social popularity ranging from wait-and-see to average; provincial total examinees in 2026 approximately 1.2 million, a significant increase from 352,000 in History Category in 2025, intensifying competition; NPU located in Xi'an, Shaanxi, a western 985, liberal arts enrollment small, competition for Henan History Category examinees applying to this university significantly affected by enrollment reduction.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1833, a significant enrollment reduction of approximately 39% in 2026 (notable effect of decreasing ranking numbers), a substantial increase in Henan examinee numbers (further intensifying competition), and NPU's liberal arts not being a strength, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1373, with a range of 1167–1579.
